task_completion.description: Create Page 1 with the title 'Fraction Vocabulary' and definitions for 'Numerator' and 'Denominator'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: ActivInspire is open. The canvas shows the text 'Fraction Vocabulary' along with the words 'Numerator' and 'Denominator' and their corresponding definitions.

task_completion.description: Create a second page in the flipchart.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The page navigator, thumbnail view, or page counter in ActivInspire indicates that a second page (Page 2) has been created and is active.

task_completion.description: Create the first two rows of the fraction wall on Page 2 with correct labels and distinct colors.
task_completion.visual_evidence: On Page 2, there is one rectangle labeled '1 Whole' (Row 1) and two rectangles below it labeled '1/2' (Row 2). The rectangles in Row 1 and Row 2 must be different colors.

task_completion.description: Create the last two rows of the fraction wall on Page 2 with correct labels, counts, and distinct colors.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Below Row 2, there are four rectangles labeled '1/4' (Row 3) and eight rectangles labeled '1/8' (Row 4). Row 3 and Row 4 must use distinct colors from each other and from Rows 1 and 2.

task_completion.description: Save the flipchart to the specified directory with the correct filename.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save' or 'Save As' dialog shows the filename 'fraction_lesson.flipchart' being saved in the '/home/ga/Documents/Flipcharts' directory, or the application title bar updates to show this filename.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the ActivInspire GUI to create the lesson.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent interacting with the ActivInspire interface (e.g., clicking tools, opening menus), rather than generating the .flipchart file directly via a terminal script.

integrity.description: Verify the fraction wall is constructed using individual drawn shapes.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent should be seen using the shape tool to draw individual rectangles or copy-pasting individual rectangles, rather than importing a single pre-made image of a fraction wall from the web.

integrity.description: Verify the agent manually added the text for vocabulary and labels.
integrity.visual_evidence: Text boxes should be actively edited on the canvas using the text tool, showing the typing or pasting of the required terms and labels.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires exactly 2 pages. Page 1 must contain the terms 'Numerator' and 'Denominator'. Page 2 must contain a fraction wall with exactly 15 rectangles: 1 labeled '1 Whole', 2 labeled '1/2', 4 labeled '1/4', and 8 labeled '1/8'. Each of the 4 rows must use a distinct color. The final file must be saved as 'fraction_lesson.flipchart' in the '/home/ga/Documents/Flipcharts' directory.
